description: Allow prestataire to record a voice note in the intervention closure modal, saved as intervention_document with type note_vocale.

userStories.title: Migration DB: enum note_vocale + MIME audio bucket
userStories.description: Add note_vocale to intervention_document_type enum and audio MIME types to storage bucket
acceptanceCriteria: Enum note_vocale present in database.types.ts
Storage bucket accepts audio/webm, audio/mp4, audio/ogg, audio/wav, audio/mpeg
Migration is idempotent
userStories.notes: Migration applied + types regenerated. note_vocale in database.types.ts lines 4253/4570.

userStories.title: Hook useAudioRecorder (MediaRecorder API)
userStories.description: Custom React hook wrapping MediaRecorder API with cross-browser MIME detection, permission handling, timer, and cleanup
acceptanceCriteria: MIME detection: webm/opus (Chrome/Firefox) then mp4 (Safari) fallback
Permission denied shows French error message
Auto-stop at 5 minutes
No memory leaks (cleanup streams + objectURL)
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Hook created at hooks/use-audio-recorder.ts (~230 lines). Cross-browser MIME detection, permission handling, timer with auto-stop, cleanup on unmount. Exports audioBlobToFile helper.

userStories.title: VoiceRecorder component (3-state UI)
userStories.description: Reusable UI component with idle/recording/recorded states, mobile-first design
acceptanceCriteria: 3 visual states: idle (mic button), recording (pulse + timer + stop), recorded (audio player + re-record + delete)
Native <audio controls> for playback
Touch targets >= 44px
Disabled state support
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Component at components/intervention/voice-recorder.tsx (~180 lines). 4 states: idle (dashed mic button), recording (red pulse + timer + stop), recorded (audio controls + re-record + delete), error (alert). Mobile touch targets 44px.

userStories.title: Integration: modal + upload + schemas
userStories.description: Wire VoiceRecorder into SimpleWorkCompletionModal, upload voice note via existing API before closure, update Zod schema and MIME types
acceptanceCriteria: VoiceRecorder visible in modal between rapport and photos sections
Voice note uploaded via /api/upload-intervention-document before closure
Upload failure prevents closure (no data loss)
Without voice note, existing behavior unchanged
Zod schema accepts audio MIME types
use-intervention-upload.ts MIME types and DOCUMENT_TYPES updated
upload route getDocumentType detects audio as note_vocale
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: 6 files modified: simple-types.ts (+voiceNote), simple-work-completion-modal.tsx (+VoiceRecorder), intervention-action-buttons.tsx (upload-before-close), upload-intervention-document route.ts (audio→note_vocale), schemas.ts (audio MIME), use-intervention-upload.ts (MIME+DOCUMENT_TYPES). Full syntax check passed.
